_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: AAV-K55-GFP primarily transduced the S100B-positive population, indicating the delivery targeted the neurofibroma Schwann cells
details: Successfully identified S100B-positive Schwann cell populations in immunofluorescence staining, showing AAV-K55-GFP primarily transduced these cells
